- brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- frontend-design:frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- superpowers:brainstorming: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies
- superpowers:executing-plans: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints
- superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work - guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup
- superpowers:receiving-code-review: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions, especially if feedback seems unclear or technically questionable - requires technical rigor and verification, not performative agreement or blind implementation
- superpowers:requesting-code-review: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements
- superpowers:subagent-driven-development: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session
- superpowers:systematic-debugging: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes
- superpowers:test-driven-development: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code
- superpowers:using-git-worktrees: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - ensures an isolated workspace exists via native tools or git worktree fallback
- superpowers:using-superpowers: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
- superpowers:verification-before-completion: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
- superpowers:writing-plans
- superpowers:writing-skills
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

41	## IRM-042 — 处置方式条件逻辑
42	
43	### 1. 需求说明
44	
45	选择处置方式后，根据所选方式差异化展示附加字段，并对"回避"方式自动处理残余风险评估。
46	
47	| 处置方式 | 新增字段 | 残余评估 |
48	|---------|---------|---------|
49	| Avoid（回避） | Justification（必填） | 自动置零，跳过评估步骤 |
50	| Transfer（转移） | Justification（必填）、Transfer Target（选填）、Transfer Terms（选填） | 正常显示 |
51	| Reduce（缓解） | Justification（必填） | 正常显示 |
52	| Accept（接受） | Justification（必填） | 正常显示 |
53	
54	---
55	
56	### 2. 后端改动
57	
58	#### 2.1 数据库 — `risk_info` 表新增字段
59	
60	```sql
61	ALTER TABLE `risk_info`
62	  ADD COLUMN `justification`       TEXT          NULL COMMENT '处置方式理由',
63	  ADD COLUMN `justification_ar`    TEXT          NULL COMMENT '处置方式理由（阿语）',
64	  ADD COLUMN `transfer_target`     VARCHAR(500)  NULL COMMENT '转移目标（Transfer 专用）',
65	  ADD COLUMN `transfer_target_ar`  VARCHAR(500)  NULL COMMENT '转移目标（阿语，Transfer 专用）',
66	  ADD COLUMN `transfer_terms`      TEXT          NULL COMMENT '转移条款（Transfer 专用）',
67	  ADD COLUMN `transfer_terms_ar`   TEXT          NULL COMMENT '转移条款（阿语，Transfer 专用）';
68	```
69	
70	#### 2.2 `RiskEntity.java` — 新增六个字段
71	
72	```java
73	@TableField("justification")
74	private String justification;
75	
76	@TableField("justification_ar")
77	private String justificationAr;
78	
79	@TableField("transfer_target")
80	private String transferTarget;
81	
82	@TableField("transfer_target_ar")
83	private String transferTargetAr;
84	
85	@TableField("transfer_terms")
86	private String transferTerms;
87	
88	@TableField("transfer_terms_ar")
89	private String transferTermsAr;
90	```
91	
92	#### 2.3 `TreatmentApproachSaveBO.java` — 新增六个字段
93	
94	> 注：Controller 直接使用 BO 作为 `@RequestBody`，无单独 Request 类。
95	
96	```java
97	private String justification;
98	private String justificationAr;
99	private String transferTarget;    // Transfer 时可选
100	private String transferTargetAr;  // Transfer 时可选（阿语）
101	private String transferTerms;     // Transfer 时可选
102	private String transferTermsAr;   // Transfer 时可选（阿语）
103	```
104	
105	#### 2.4 服务层 — `RiskServiceImpl.saveTreatmentApproach()`
106	
107	- 保存全部 6 个双语字段
108	- Avoid（值=1）时自动置零残余风险并标记评估完成
109	- 从 Avoid 切换到其他方式时重置残余评估状态为 NOT_ACCOMPLISH，要求用户重新填写
110	
111	```java
112	riskEntity.setJustification(request.getJustification());
113	riskEntity.setJustificationAr(request.getJustificationAr());
114	riskEntity.setTransferTarget(request.getTransferTarget());
115	riskEntity.setTransferTargetAr(request.getTransferTargetAr());
116	riskEntity.setTransferTerms(request.getTransferTerms());
117	riskEntity.setTransferTermsAr(request.getTransferTermsAr());
118	
119	if (RiskManagementStrategyEnum.AVOID.getCode().equals(request.getTreatmentApproach())) {
120	    riskEntity.setResidualLikelihood(0);
121	    riskEntity.setResidualMaxImpact(0);
122	    riskEntity.setResidualRate(0);
123	    riskEntity.setResidualInherentRiskClassification(0L);
124	    riskEntity.setResidualLikelihoodNote(null);
125	    riskEntity.setResidualAssessmentComment(null);
126	    riskEntity.setResidualStrategy(null);
127	    riskEntity.setResidualAssessmentStatus(CompletionStatusEnum.ACCOMPLISH.getCode());
128	} else if (RiskManagementStrategyEnum.AVOID.getCode().equals(previousApproach)) {
129	    riskEntity.setResidualAssessmentStatus(CompletionStatusEnum.NOT_ACCOMPLISH.getCode());
130	}
131	```
132	
133	#### 2.5 详情返回 — `RiskDetailBO` / `RiskDetailResponse`

135	两个类均通过 `BeanUtils.copyProperties` 链路自动传递，只需新增字段声明：

144	```

146	涉及接口：`POST /api/risk/detail` → 返回 `RiskDetailResponse`
147	
148	#### 2.6 记录详情列表返回 — `RecordRiskControlInfoResponse`
149	
150	`RecordActivityResponse.riskControlInfoList` 中每条风险控制记录需携带处置方式附加字段，在 `RiskDetailConverter.convertRiskControlInfoList()` 中手动赋值：

153	recordRiskControlInfoResponse.setJustification(riskEntity.getJustification());
154	recordRiskControlInfoResponse.setJustificationAr(riskEntity.getJustificationAr());
155	recordRiskControlInfoResponse.setTransferTarget(riskEntity.getTransferTarget());
156	recordRiskControlInfoResponse.setTransferTargetAr(riskEntity.getTransferTargetAr());
157	recordRiskControlInfoResponse.setTransferTerms(riskEntity.getTransferTerms());
158	recordRiskControlInfoResponse.setTransferTermsAr(riskEntity.getTransferTermsAr());
159	```
160	
161	涉及接口：`POST /api/risk-record/detail` → `RecordDetailResponse.activityList[].riskControlInfoList`

168	
169	**文件路径：** `src/pages/Work/RiskCreationWizard/components/RiskDetail/components/TreatmentApproachPanel/index.tsx`
170

172	
173	```tsx

204	          </Form.Item>

212	保存时将新字段合并进请求体：
213	
214	```tsx
215	const handleSave = async () => {

217	  await getRiskSaveTreatmentApproach({
218	    riskId,

293	## IRM-044 — 控制措施详情与保存接口

295	> **后端实现状态：✅ 已完成**

433	
434	V1.6 使用 Jaccard 系数实现关键词相似度（为未来升级 AI 预留接口）：
435	
436	```java
437	public class RiskSimilarityUtil {
438	
439	    public static double calcSimilarity(String text1, String text2) {
440	        Set<String> set1 = tokenize(text1);
441	        Set<String> set2 = tokenize(text2);
442	        Set<String> intersection = new HashSet<>(set1);
443	        intersection.retainAll(set2);
444	        Set<String> union = new HashSet<>(set1);
445	        union.addAll(set2);
446	        if (union.isEmpty()) return 0.0;
447	        return (double) intersection.size() / union.size();
448	    }
449	
450	    private static Set<String> tokenize(String text) {
451	        if (StrUtil.isBlank(text)) return Collections.emptySet();
452	        return Arrays.stream(text.toLowerCase().split("[\\s\\p{Punct}]+"))
453	                .filter(w -> w.length() > 1)
454	                .collect(Collectors.toSet());
455	    }
456	}
457	```

599	### 1. 需求说明
600

666	```java
667	private Integer computePhaseStatus(CycleEntity cycle, LocalDate now) {
668	    if (cycle.getMonitoringStartDate() == null || cycle.getMonitoringEndDate() == null) return null;
669	    if (cycle.getStartDate() != null && now.isBefore(cycle.getStartDate()))
670	        return CyclePhaseStatusEnum.NOT_STARTED.getCode();
671	    if (cycle.getEndDate() != null && !now.isAfter(cycle.getEndDate()))
672	        return CyclePhaseStatusEnum.EVALUATING.getCode();
673	    if (!now.isAfter(cycle.getMonitoringEndDate()))
674	        return CyclePhaseStatusEnum.MONITORING.getCode();
675	    return CyclePhaseStatusEnum.COMPLETED.getCode();
676	}

925	
926	```java
927	private void syncCompletionStatus(Long riskId) {
928	    int accomplishCode = CompletionStatusEnum.ACCOMPLISH.getCode();
929	    // 先无条件重置为未完成
930	    update(new LambdaUpdateWrapper<RiskEntity>()
931	        .eq(RiskEntity::getRiskId, riskId)
932	        .set(RiskEntity::getCompletionStatus, CompletionStatusEnum.NOT_ACCOMPLISH.getCode()));
933	    // 六项全部完成时升为已完成
934	    update(new LambdaUpdateWrapper<RiskEntity>()
935	        .eq(RiskEntity::getRiskId, riskId)
936	        .eq(RiskEntity::getEstablishStatus, accomplishCode)
937	        .eq(RiskEntity::getInherentAssessmentStatus, accomplishCode)
938	        .eq(RiskEntity::getControlsStatus, accomplishCode)
939	        .eq(RiskEntity::getTreatmentApproachStatus, accomplishCode)
940	        .eq(RiskEntity::getTreatmentStatus, accomplishCode)
941	        .eq(RiskEntity::getResidualAssessmentStatus, accomplishCode)
942	        .set(RiskEntity::getCompletionStatus, accomplishCode));
943	}
944	```
945	
946	**六处触发点（各子状态保存完成后调用）：**
947	
948	| 方法 | 触发条件 |
949	|------|---------|
950	| `saveRiskInherent()` | 固有评估保存后 |
951	| `saveRiskControl()` | 控制措施保存后 |
952	| `saveRiskResidual()` | 残余评估保存后 |
953	| `saveTreatmentApproach()` | 处置方式保存后 |
954	| `saveRiskTreatment()` | 处置计划保存后 |
955	
956	> `establishStatus` 在新建风险时自动设为 `ACCOMPLISH`，无需单独触发。

1031	## IRM-059c — 添加后删除风险异常修复
1032	
1033	### 1. 问题定位
1034	
1035	**Bug 复现路径：** 在 RIA 记录同一页面，先添加一条风险（调用 `activityRiskAdd` API），成功后在未刷新页面的情况下立即删除该风险，出现数据残留/报错/操作无响应。
1036	
1037	**根因分析：** 添加操作成功后，若本地 state 通过"merge 返回值"方式更新（而非重新拉取全量列表），新风险在 state 中的数据结构可能与后续删除操作所期望的格式不一致（如 `riskId` 字段未正确赋值），导致删除 API 传参错误，或 API 成功但本地 state 中仍残留该项。
1038	
1039	---
1040	
1041	### 2. 修复方案
1042	
1043	**核心原则：添加和删除操作成功后，统一改为重新拉取全量列表，放弃本地 state merge。**
1044	
1045	**文件：** `src/pages/Work/RiskCreationWizard/components/RiskTable/index.tsx`
1046	
1047	```typescript
1048	// 添加风险成功回调
1049	const handleAddSuccess = () => {
1050	  // 改为：完全重新拉取列表，不做本地 merge
1051	  refreshRiskList()
1052	  setAddRiskModalVisible(false)
1053	  Message.success(t('common:saveSuccess'))
1054	}
1055	
1056	// 删除风险成功回调
1057	const handleDeleteSuccess = () => {
1058	  refreshRiskList()
1059	  setDeleteModalVisible(false)
1060	  setDeleteRiskId(undefined)  // 清空，防止二次误用
1061	}
1062	
1063	// 删除弹窗关闭时也清空 deleteRiskId
1064	const handleDeleteModalClose = () => {
1065	  setDeleteModalVisible(false)
1066	  setDeleteRiskId(undefined)
1067	}
1068	```
1069

1365	      title: t('risk:activityCoverageWarningTitle'),
1366	      content: (

1368	          <p>{t('risk:activityCoverageWarningDesc')}</p>
1369	          <ul>

1371	              <li key={a.activityId}>
1372	                {handelFieldNameShow(a.activityName, a.activityNameAr)}
1373	              </li>
1374	            ))}
1375	          </ul>
1376	        </div>
1377	      ),
1378	      okText: t('common:continueSubmit'),
1379	      cancelText: t('common:cancel'),

1381	    })
1382	  } else {
1383	    doSubmit()
1384	  }
1385	}

1	# [IRM-060a] 默认展示部门活动并改进风险选择器 / Default Department Activities Display with Improved Risk Selector
2	
3	---
4	
5	## 元数据
6	
7	| 字段 | 值 |
8	|---|---|
9	| **需求编号** | IRM-060a |
10	| **项目** | IRM |
11	| **版本** | V1.6 |
12	| **创建日期** | 2026-06-11 |
13	| **类型** | Enhancement |
14	| **优先级** | P0 |
15	| **来源** | Feishu (Risk v1.6) |
16	| **目标用户** | 风险管理员、部门风险负责人 |
17	| **PM 状态** | `approved` |
18	| **开发状态** | `待排期` |
19	| **QA 状态** | `待测试` |
20	| **UI 状态** | `待设计` |
21	
22	---
23	
24	## §0 位置指引
25	
26	**模块：** Work → RIA Creation Wizard → Assessment 标签页
27	
28	**子模块：** 活动树展示与风险选择器
29	
30	**导航步骤：**
31	1. 登录系统
32	2. 点击左侧导航 → Work → 打开或创建一条 RIA 记录
33	3. 进入 Assessment 标签页
34	4. 查看左侧活动树，右侧风险评估区域
35	
36	---
37	
38	## 1. 背景与痛点 / Background & Pain Points
39	
40	![当前添加风险弹窗](artifacts/60.png)
41	
42	![策略系统选择器参考](artifacts/60b.png)
43	
44	当前 RIA 评估标签页存在两个核心问题：活动展示不完整，以及风险选择器不易用。
45	
46	The current RIA Assessment tab has two core issues: incomplete activity display, and a hard-to-use risk selector.
47	
48	**痛点一：活动展示不完整。** 当前打开 RIA 记录时，系统仅展示已关联风险的活动，而非该部门的所有活动。用户无法直观看到哪些活动尚未覆盖风险，容易遗漏。
49	
50	**Pain point 1: Incomplete activity display.** When opening an RIA record, the system only shows activities that already have associated risks, rather than all activities for the department. Users cannot easily see which activities lack risk coverage, leading to potential omissions.
51	
52	**痛点二：风险选择器体验差。** 当前"添加风险"按钮打开的是一个简单的下拉多选弹窗，当风险库中风险数量较多时，用户难以浏览、搜索和确认已选项。缺少风险详情预览，也无法清晰看到已选列表。
53	
54	**Pain point 2: Poor risk selector experience.** The current "Add Risk" button opens a simple multi-select dropdown modal. When the risk library contains many risks, it is difficult for users to browse, search, and confirm selections. There is no risk detail preview, and no clear view of the selected list.
55	
56	**不做的后果：** 活动覆盖率无法保障，部门可能遗漏关键活动的风险评估；风险选择效率低下，用户在大量风险中难以快速找到目标。
57	
58	**Consequence of not doing this:** Activity coverage cannot be guaranteed, departments may miss risk assessments for key activities; risk selection is inefficient, making it hard for users to quickly find target risks among a large list.
59	
60	---
61	
62	## 2. 目标用户与使用场景 / Target Users & Scenarios
63	
64	- **谁会用？** 风险管理员（创建和编辑 RIA 记录）、部门风险负责人（审核活动覆盖完整性）
65	- **什么时候用？** 创建新周期的 RIA 记录时；在评估标签页添加和评估风险时
66	- **使用频率：** 每个评估周期使用，通常每季度或每半年一次
67	
68	- **Who will use it?** Risk administrators (creating and editing RIA records), department risk owners (reviewing activity coverage completeness)
69	- **When?** When creating RIA records for a new cycle; when adding and assessing risks on the Assessment tab
70	- **How often?** Used each assessment cycle, typically quarterly or semi-annually
71	
72	---
73	
74	## 3. 需求描述 / Requirements
75	
76	### 3.1 默认展示部门全部活动 / Default Display of All Department Activities
77	
78	**当前行为：** 打开 RIA 记录时，活动树仅展示已关联风险的活动。
79	
80	**Current behavior:** When opening an RIA record, the activity tree only shows activities that already have associated risks.
81	
82	**目标行为：** 系统应在打开或创建 RIA 记录时，自动加载该部门组织架构下的所有活动。左侧活动树展示全部活动，每个活动节点旁显示已关联的风险数量。未关联任何风险的活动应有明显的视觉区分（如显示风险数量为零），使用户能快速识别覆盖缺口。
83	
84	**Target behavior:** When opening or creating an RIA record, the system should automatically load all activities under the department's organizational structure. The activity tree on the left displays all activities, with each activity node showing the count of associated risks. Activities with no associated risks should be visually distinct (e.g., showing a risk count of zero), enabling users to quickly identify coverage gaps.
85	
86	### 3.2 改进风险选择器——"添加已有风险" / Improved Risk Selector — "Add Existing Risk"
87	
88	**当前行为：** 评估标签页中有一个"添加风险"按钮，点击后打开简单的下拉多选弹窗，用户从风险库中选择风险。下拉列表难以浏览和搜索，无法查看风险详情，也不方便确认已选项。
89	
90	**Current behavior:** The Assessment tab has an "Add Risk" button that opens a simple multi-select dropdown modal for selecting risks from the library. The dropdown is difficult to browse and search, provides no risk detail preview, and makes it hard to confirm selections.
91	
92	**目标行为：** 系统应将"添加风险"按钮改为"添加已有风险"按钮。点击后打开改进的风险选择器，采用与策略系统用户选择器（参见截图 60b）类似的双面板模式：左侧面板展示可搜索的风险库列表，显示风险名称及关键信息（如风险类别、描述摘要），支持关键词搜索和筛选；右侧面板展示已选风险列表，用户可在此确认或移除已选项。该双面板选择器替代当前的单下拉弹窗。
93	
94	**Target behavior:** The system should rename the "Add Risk" button to "Add Existing Risk". Clicking it opens an improved risk selector using a dual-panel pattern similar to the Strategy system's user selector (see screenshot 60b): the left panel shows a searchable risk library list displaying risk names and key details (such as risk category and description summary), with keyword search and filtering support; the right panel shows the selected risks list, where users can confirm or remove selections. This dual-panel selector replaces the current single-dropdown modal.
95	
96	### 3.3 每个活动至少关联一条风险的校验 / Minimum One Risk per Activity Validation
97	
98	**当前行为：** 系统不检查活动是否关联了风险，用户可以提交没有任何风险覆盖的活动。
99	
100	**Current behavior:** The system does not check whether activities have associated risks, and users can submit activities without any risk coverage.
101	
102	**目标行为：** 系统应在用户提交 RIA 记录前进行校验。如果存在任何活动未关联至少一条风险，系统应显示警告提示，列出缺少风险的活动名称，提醒用户补充。该校验为警告性质，不阻止提交（用户确认后仍可继续提交）。
103	
104	**Target behavior:** The system should validate before the user submits the RIA record. If any activity has no associated risks, the system should display a warning listing the activity names that lack risks, reminding the user to add coverage. This validation is a warning only and does not block submission (the user can still proceed after acknowledging).
105	
106	**交叉引用：** 本校验与 IRM-049（V1.5+hotfix.1）中活动覆盖率相关需求保持一致。
107	
108	**Cross-reference:** This validation is consistent with activity coverage requirements in IRM-049 (V1.5+hotfix.1).
109	
110	### 范围外 / Out of Scope
111	
112	- 提议新风险流程不在本需求范围内（见 IRM-060b）。
113	- Proposing new risks is out of scope for this PRD (see IRM-060b).
114	- 历史周期自动填充不在本需求范围内（见 IRM-060c）。
115	- Auto-fill from previous cycle is out of scope for this PRD (see IRM-060c).
116	
117	---
118	
119	## 4. 验收标准 / Acceptance Criteria
120	
121	| ID | 标准 | 优先级 |
122	|---|---|---|
123	| AC-001 | 打开或创建 RIA 记录时，活动树自动展示该部门的所有活动，包括尚未关联风险的活动 / When opening or creating an RIA record, the activity tree automatically displays all activities for the department, including those without associated risks | P0 |
124	| AC-002 | 每个活动节点旁显示已关联的风险数量，未关联风险的活动有明显视觉区分 / Each activity node shows the count of associated risks, and activities without risks are visually distinct | P0 |
125	| AC-003 | 点击"添加已有风险"按钮后，打开双面板选择器：左侧显示可搜索的风险库列表（含风险名称和关键信息），右侧显示已选风险列表 / Clicking "Add Existing Risk" opens a dual-panel selector: left panel shows a searchable risk library list (with risk name and key details), right panel shows selected risks | P0 |
126	| AC-004 | 用户可在双面板选择器中通过关键词搜索风险，并可在右侧面板移除已选项 / Users can search risks by keyword in the dual-panel selector and remove selections from the right panel | P0 |
127	| AC-005 | 提交 RIA 记录前，如存在未关联风险的活动，系统显示警告提示并列出相关活动名称 / Before submitting an RIA record, if any activity has no associated risks, the system displays a warning listing the relevant activity names | P0 |
128	| AC-006 | 活动覆盖率校验为警告性质，用户确认后仍可继续提交 / The activity coverage validation is a warning only, and users can proceed with submission after acknowledging | P1 |
